10/01/2023
929 NTRTN_NONE_DSCHRG_CD NTRTN_NONE_DSCHRG_CD K0520Z4 Nutritional Approaches (Discharge): None CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed none of the listed nutritional approaches in the last three days of the resident's stay at the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
930 ANTPSYCT_TKNG_CD ANTPSYCT_TKNG_CD N0415A1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antipsychotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antipsychotic medication
